text:
Hostel Fee Structure
- Non-AC Room: ₹1,15,000 per year
- AC Room: ₹1,30,000 per year
- Includes: Laundry expenses and medical insurance up to ₹2,00,000
- Admission Fee: ₹15,000 (one time, non-refundable) separate from hostel fee
- Payment: Semester-wise payment accepted

Room Types and Occupancy
- Double Sharing Room (Non-AC): Standard option for most students
- Double Sharing Room (AC): Premium option with air conditioning
- Triple Sharing Room (Non-AC): Economy option available on request
- Single Room: Available for PG and PhD scholars subject to availability
- All rooms include: Cot, mattress, study table, chair, wardrobe, and fan or AC

Mess and Dining Facilities
- Separate mess for Boys and Girls hostels
- Vegetarian and Non-Vegetarian options available daily
- Meal Plan: Breakfast, Lunch, Evening Snacks, and Dinner
- Mess Timing:
  - Breakfast: 7:00 AM to 9:00 AM
  - Lunch: 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM
  - Evening Snacks: 4:30 PM to 5:30 PM
  - Dinner: 7:30 PM to 8:30 PM
- Special meals on festivals and university events
- Hygienic kitchen with RO purified water throughout the hostel

Sports and Recreation Facilities
- Indoor Games Room: Carrom, Chess, Table Tennis, Foosball
- Outdoor Sports: Cricket ground, Football ground, Basketball court, Volleyball court
- Badminton courts within campus
- Gymnasium: Fully equipped gym available for hostel students
- Recreation Room: Television lounge with DTH connection

Study and Academic Support
- 24-hour reading room and study hall
- High-speed Wi-Fi internet throughout hostel premises
- Computer lab access for hostel students during off-hours
- Separate quiet zones for exam preparation
- Power backup (UPS and generator) for uninterrupted study

Safety and Security
- 24-hour security at all hostel gates
- CCTV surveillance at entry, exit, corridors, and common areas
- Biometric attendance system at hostel entry
- Visitor policy: Visitors allowed only in designated visitor rooms during visiting hours
- Visiting Hours: 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM on weekdays and weekends
- Emergency contact numbers displayed at all floors

Medical Facilities
- On-campus medical centre with resident doctor
- 24-hour nurse available at hostel
- First-aid kit at every floor
- Medical insurance up to ₹2,00,000 included in hostel fee
- Tie-up with nearby hospitals in Samalkot and Kakinada for emergencies
- Ambulance facility available on campus

Other Amenities
- RO water purifiers on every floor
- Washing machines in laundry room (laundry included in fee)
- Ironing facility available
- ATM on campus
- Stationery and grocery shop within campus
- Photocopy and printing facility
- Prayer room and meditation hall
- Courier and parcel collection point

Hostel Rules and Regulations
- Hostel gate closing time: 9:00 PM (Students must return by 9:00 PM)
- Permission required for overnight absence — written request to Hostel Warden
- No ragging — zero tolerance policy strictly enforced
- No alcohol, tobacco, or illegal substances permitted
- Damage to hostel property will be charged to the student
- Students must maintain discipline and cleanliness in rooms and common areas

Hostel Admission Process
- Step 1: Apply for hostel at the time of college admission
- Step 2: Hostel allotment based on availability and program
- Step 3: Pay hostel fee at the time of joining
- Step 4: Collect room keys and hostel ID from Hostel Office
- Preference given to: outstation students, first-year students, girl students

Hostel Contact
- Boys Hostel Warden: Available at Boys Hostel Office
- Girls Hostel Warden: Available at Girls Hostel Office
- Hostel Office Email: hostel@adityauniversity.in
- Dean of Admissions: Dr. A. Rama Krishna — Cell: 76590 76662
- Campus: Surampalem, East Godavari, Andhra Pradesh — 533437

Parent Room Overview
- Aditya University provides dedicated guest rooms for parents and guardians visiting their ward
- Located within the campus at Surampalem, East Godavari, Andhra Pradesh
- Designed to give parents a comfortable stay while visiting for admissions, parent-teacher meetings, or personal visits
- Prior booking is mandatory — walk-in availability not guaranteed

Room Types and Charges
- Standard Room (Non-AC): ₹500 per night
  - Includes: 1 double bed, attached bathroom, fan, TV
- Standard Room (AC): ₹800 per night
  - Includes: 1 double bed, attached bathroom, AC, TV, hot water
- Family Suite (AC): ₹1,200 per night
  - Includes: 2 beds, sitting area, attached bathroom, AC, TV, hot water
  - Suitable for families with 3 to 4 members
- Checkout Time: 11:00 AM
- Check-in Time: 12:00 PM

Facilities in Parent Guest Rooms
- Clean and well-maintained rooms with daily housekeeping
- Attached bathrooms with hot and cold water
- Television with DTH connection
- Wi-Fi internet access
- Bed linen and towels provided
- Power backup — uninterrupted electricity through UPS and generator
- Room service available between 7:00 AM and 10:00 PM

Dining Arrangements for Parents
- Parents can avail meals at the University Guest Dining Hall
- Meal Charges (separate from room charges):
  - Breakfast: ₹80 per person
  - Lunch: ₹150 per person
  - Dinner: ₹150 per person
- Vegetarian and Non-Vegetarian options available
- Meals must be pre-ordered by informing the front desk one hour in advance
- Tea and coffee available at canteen from 7:00 AM to 9:00 PM

Booking Process
- Step 1: Contact the Admissions Office or Hostel Office at least 3 days in advance
- Step 2: Provide student name, roll number, program, and dates of visit
- Step 3: Room allotment confirmed via phone or email
- Step 4: Pay room charges at the Hostel Office on arrival
- Online booking: Available at admissions.adityauniversity.in (Guest Room Booking section)
- Payment Modes: Cash, UPI, Net Banking, Debit / Credit Card

Availability and Booking Priority
- Priority 1: Parents visiting during admission season (June to August)
- Priority 2: Parents attending Parent-Teacher Meetings and Annual Day
- Priority 3: General visits throughout the year
- Peak season (admission time): Advance booking of 7 days strongly recommended
- Maximum stay: 7 consecutive nights per visit

Important Dates When Parent Rooms Are in High Demand
- Admission Season: June to August every year
- Parent-Teacher Meeting: Conducted once per semester (dates communicated to students)
- Annual Day and Convocation: Typically in February or March
- Freshers Orientation: First week of July every year
- Book early during these periods to avoid unavailability

metadata.head: Important Dates When Parent Rooms Are in High Demand

text:
Rules for Parent Guest Rooms
- Only parents and immediate family members (spouse, siblings) permitted to stay
- Guests must submit a valid photo ID (Aadhaar Card, Passport, Driving Licence) at check-in
- Alcohol and smoking strictly prohibited inside guest room premises
- Noise must be kept to a minimum after 10:00 PM
- Damage to room property will be charged to the guest
- Outsiders not permitted to enter hostel or student residential areas
- Parents can meet their ward only in the designated visitor meeting area

Transportation and Connectivity
- Nearest Railway Station: Samalkot Railway Station — 8 km from campus
- Nearest Bus Stand: Peddapuram Bus Stand — 12 km from campus
- Nearest Airport: Rajahmundry Airport — 30 km from campus
- Auto and taxi services available from Samalkot and Peddapuram to campus
- University bus service: Available from Kakinada and Rajahmundry on selected schedules
- Campus location: NH-16 (National Highway 16), Surampalem, East Godavari — 533437

Contact for Parent Room Booking
- Hostel Office: Available at campus between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM on all working days
- Email: hostel@adityauniversity.in
- Dean of Admissions: Dr. A. Rama Krishna — Cell: 76590 76662
- Associate Dean of Admissions: Dr. R. Giri Prasad — Cell: 70950 76663
- Campus Address: Aditya University, Surampalem, East Godavari, Andhra Pradesh — 533437

Safety Overview
- Aditya University maintains a zero-tolerance policy for ragging, harassment, and misconduct
- All hostels are equipped with round-the-clock security and surveillance
- Anti-Ragging Committee and Internal Complaints Committee are active on campus
- Campus is a safe residential environment for students from across India

Security Infrastructure
- 24-hour security guards posted at all hostel gates (Boys and Girls hostels)
- CCTV cameras installed at: Entry gates, exit gates, corridors, stairways, and all common areas
- All footage monitored and recorded with 30-day retention
- Biometric attendance at hostel entry — records every entry and exit
- No unauthorised person permitted inside hostel premises at any time

Anti-Ragging Policy
- Aditya University strictly follows UGC Anti-Ragging Regulations 2009
- Zero tolerance — any form of ragging leads to immediate expulsion
- Anti-Ragging Squad conducts surprise checks in hostels and campus
- Every student and parent must sign an Anti-Ragging Affidavit at time of admission
- Anti-Ragging Helpline: 1800-180-5522 (National Helpline — Toll Free)
- University Anti-Ragging Committee: Contact Hostel Warden or Dean of Students

Girls Hostel Safety — Special Provisions
- Dedicated female security staff at Girls Hostel gate
- Female warden resident inside Girls Hostel at all times
- Gate closing time strictly enforced: 9:00 PM
- Male visitors not permitted inside Girls Hostel building under any circumstance
- Visitor meetings only at designated visitor waiting area
- Emergency panic buttons installed in Girls Hostel corridors and washrooms
- Internal Complaints Committee (ICC) for any harassment complaints

Fire Safety
- Fire extinguishers installed on every floor of all hostels
- Smoke detectors in all rooms and corridors
- Fire exit routes clearly marked and kept unobstructed at all times
- Annual fire safety drill conducted for all hostel students
- Emergency evacuation plan displayed on every floor

Medical Emergency Protocol
- On-campus medical centre with resident doctor: 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM
- 24-hour nurse stationed in hostel for after-hours emergencies
- First-aid kits available at every hostel floor and warden room
- Ambulance available on campus for immediate hospital transfer
- Emergency hospital tie-ups: Government Hospital Samalkot, Kakinada Government Hospital, Ramesh Hospitals Kakinada
- Medical insurance up to ₹2,00,000 included in hostel fee covers hospitalisation

Visitor Policy
- Visitors allowed only in designated visitor rooms and waiting areas
- Visiting hours: 10:00 AM to 5:00 PM on all days
- Visitors must register at the security gate with a valid photo ID
- Parents and guardians must register their contact details at the time of student admission
- Overnight stay of visitors is strictly not permitted on hostel premises

Emergency Contact Numbers
- Hostel Warden (Boys): Available at Boys Hostel Office
- Hostel Warden (Girls): Available at Girls Hostel Office
- Campus Security Control Room: Available 24 hours
- On-Campus Medical Centre: Available during hours — Nurse available 24 hours
- National Anti-Ragging Helpline: 1800-180-5522
- Nearest Police Station: Peddapuram Police Station
- Dean of Admissions: Dr. A. Rama Krishna — Cell: 76590 76662
- Associate Dean: Dr. R. Giri Prasad — Cell: 70950 76663

Student Grievance Redressal
- Any safety concern or complaint can be submitted to:
  - Hostel Warden (first point of contact)
  - Dean of Students
  - University Grievance Cell: grievance@adityauniversity.in
  - Internal Complaints Committee (for sexual harassment complaints)
- All complaints treated with strict confidentiality
- Resolution timeline: Acknowledgement within 24 hours, resolution within 7 working days
